node.title: Green Smoothie Cup Charm
node.description: A vibrant green smoothie cup charm with silver detailing. Perfect for adding a fresh, fun touch to your DIY charm collection.

node.title: Silver Spiral Wave Charm
node.description: A polished silver spiral charm with a flowing wave finish. Adds a calm, modern touch to any DIY creation.

node.title: Mystic Potion Heart Charm
node.description: A glittery blue potion-bottle charm with a pink crystal centre. Perfect for adding a touch of magic to your bracelet.

node.title: Lunar Messenger Bunny Charm
node.description: A polished gold bunny charm with a sparkling crystal eye. A sweet little messenger to brighten any bracelet.

node.title: Galaxy Wonder Rocket Charm
node.description: A gold rocket charm studded with multi-coloured crystals. Ready to launch your bracelet into orbit.

node.title: Golden Cross Charm
node.description: A classic gold cross charm with a smooth polished finish and easy-clip ring. A timeless addition to any bracelet.

node.title: Wishing Lantern Charm
node.description: A pastel blue lantern charm with pink enamel rings and a tiny ruby accent. Soft, dreamy and full of charm.

node.title: Pink Bow Sparkle Charm
node.description: A glittery pink bow charm with a heart centre and two dangling pink crystals. Pretty, playful and full of sparkle.

node.title: Pink Glitter Tag Charm
node.description: A pink glitter tag charm with a pavé crystal triangle. Bold, glamorous and made to stand out.

node.title: Sweet Cherry Pair Charm
node.description: A pair of glossy red enamel cherries with a green leaf and tiny crystal accents. Sweet, bright and full of fun.

node.title: Golden Key & Heart Charm
node.description: A polished gold key paired with a glossy puffed heart. A romantic little duo with timeless appeal.

node.title: Golden Smile Charm
node.description: A classic gold smiley face charm with a clip-on ring. Pure happiness in a tiny piece.

node.title: Linked Hearts Charm
node.description: Two gold hearts linked together with a clip-on ring. A symbol of connection and love.

node.title: Lucky Clover Charm
node.description: A four-leaf clover charm in polished gold with a sparkling crystal centre. Bring a little luck wherever you go.

node.description: Glossy gold bubble letter A charm, 2.4cm × 1.4cm. Puffed balloon style — perfect for initialling your piece.
